title: Quick Demo: ISPF Primary Menu
description: 30-second automated walkthrough. Connect, authenticate, reach ISPF.

steps.title: Connect to TN3270
steps.screen:
IBM 3270 Terminal Emulator
Connecting to localhost:3270...

Establishing TN3270 session.
steps.expected: TN3270 session established to the mainframe.
steps.hint: Use the Terminal panel and enter localhost:3270 then click Connect.

steps.title: VTAM Welcome Screen
steps.screen:
WELCOME TO MVS/TK5

HERCULES EMULATED MAINFRAME

Press ENTER to continue.
steps.expected: The VTAM welcome screen is displayed.
steps.hint: Press Enter to proceed past the welcome screen.

steps.title: TSO Logon
steps.screen:
TSO/E LOGON

User ID  ===> HERC01
Password ===> ________

Procedure ===> IKJACCNT
Acct Nmbr ===> ACCT#
Size     ===> 6144
Perform  ===>
steps.expected: Enter credentials HERC01 / CUL8TR to authenticate.
steps.hint: Type HERC01 as the user ID and CUL8TR as the password.

steps.title: ISPF Primary Menu
steps.screen:
ISPF Primary Option Menu
Option ===>

0  Settings
1  View
2  Edit
3  Utilities
4  Foreground
5  Batch
6  Command
7  Dialog Test
9  IBM Products
S  SDSF

F1=Help  F3=Exit  F4=Return
steps.expected: ISPF Primary Menu is displayed — you are now inside the mainframe.
steps.hint: You have successfully navigated from VTAM through TSO into ISPF.

steps.title: Explore SDSF
steps.screen:
SDSF PRIMARY OPTION MENU

DA  Active users
I   Input queue
O   Output queue
H   Held output
ST  Status of jobs
LOG System log

Command ===>
steps.expected: SDSF shows active jobs, queues, and system log.
steps.hint: Type S from the ISPF menu to enter SDSF.

steps.title: Demo Complete
steps.screen:
Demo walkthrough complete.

You have:
- Connected via TN3270
- Authenticated with RACF
- Reached ISPF
- Explored SDSF

Next: Try the Security Labs.
steps.expected: Understand the full session stack from TN3270 to ISPF.
steps.hint: The full path is: TN3270 -> VTAM -> TSO -> RACF -> ISPF -> SDSF.
